name: BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Process Name Patterns
notes: This Building Block triggers when a cryptocurrency mining process starts.
bb_references: BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Process Name Patterns on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when an event matches any of the following BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Process Names
when any of Process Name (custom) match (?i).*(miner|coin|crypt).*
TD_list: APPLY BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Process Name Patterns on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND NOT when an event matches any of the following BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Process Names
AND when any of Process Name (custom) match (?i).*(miner|coin|crypt).*
